english_query: But then, bright young one, how can any person say that what we know is just what we see, or that what looks true to each person is true?
ugf_response: I am scared to say, old teacher, that I have no answer, because you told me not to use that way out just now; but I certainly cannot try to say that people who are not thinking right or who are sleeping think true things, when they think, some of them that they are big leaders, and others that they can fly, and are flying in their sleep.

english_query: The only way to have a wrong thought is when you know me and the other man, and have the mark of both of you on the soft stuff like a sign, but see me not well and from far away, and I try to put the right mark of memory to the right mark of sight, and fit this into its own place: if I do it right, I will know it; but if I do it wrong and change them, putting the foot into the wrong shoe--that is to say, putting the sight of either of you on to the wrong mark, or if my mind, like the sight in a glass, which is moved from right to left, goes wrong because of some same thing, then having a different thought and a wrong thought happen.
ugf_response: Yes old teacher, you have told about what a thought is with great care.

english_query: Also, a choose shows a different. But the one who makes all wants all people to be safe. So the first choose that makes people go to always be safe has no choose.
ugf_response: The one who makes all wants all people to be safe by his first want, which is a want that is not just a simple want but a want that also says about other things; and not by his later want, which is a want that is just a simple want.

english_query: Will you have one way to say what they all are?
ugf_response: That is what I am looking for.

english_query: Also, even though men have looked at the whole world where people live, no one has said anything about the place of the happy garden. So it seems it is not a place you can touch.
ugf_response: The place of the happy garden is kept away from the world where people live by big hills, or big bodies of water, or a very hot area that no one can go through; and so people who write about places do not say anything about it.

english_query: Also, the pictures of things in god are always there; and they are only different from each other because of how they look at things, as said before. So there are many more always-there ties in god.
ugf_response: These ties are there as god knows them. So it does not follow from their being many that there are many ties in god; but that god knows these many ties.

english_query: Very well; do so if you will.
ugf_response: Then now, the bright young one, look at the thing in a new way: you said that what someone knows is what they feel?

english_query: Also, whatever is known is known by some doing. If the part of us that thinks knows its own doing, it knows it by some doing, and again it knows that doing by some other doing; this goes on forever, which seems not possible.
ugf_response: The work of the part of us that thinks is not the same as the thing it looks at. Just as a thing and its good part are seen by one look, the work of the part of us that thinks and the thing are not seen by one look. So the work of seeing a rock is not the same as the work of seeing that it sees a rock. And there is no problem with the part of us that thinks being able to do this many times, as said before.

english_query: Also, no thing is known unless the mind gets a clear mark from the thing known; just like a body gets its look from its shape. But one body cannot have many shapes at once. So one mind cannot know many things at the same time.
ugf_response: The mind gets the clear mark it has inside it. So it can see many things at once under one mark; as one body with one shape can be like many other bodies.

english_query: Then my answer is, that they are not looked at at all.
ugf_response: How not looked at? Do they not have very big power in the groups of people?

english_query: To be sure; I remember it all, and I do not think that those who are in this state know things.
ugf_response: When a person at the time of learning writes the name of the first man, and thinks that he should write and does write the first two marks; but, again, meaning to write the name of the second man, thinks that he should write and does write the first two marks--can we think that he knows the first parts of your two names?

english_query: Also, what god can do, he can do now, since his power is not less. But god could have done, before the old teacher ran, that he should not run. So, when he has run, god can do that he did not run.
ugf_response: As god, with his full power, can do all things, and yet some things are not under his power because they cannot be done; so, also, if we look at how the power of god does not change, whatever god could do, he can do now. Some things, however, were possible when they were yet to be done, which now are not possible when they have been done. So god is said not to be able to do them, because they themselves cannot be done.

english_query: Also, the old teacher says that many bad acts come from too much own love and also from want of what others have. But if a cause is true then its end comes after. So if too much own love and want of what others have can be in the ones, then for the same reason other bad acts can also be in them.
ugf_response: All other bad acts that come from own love or want are already in the bad ones.

english_query: Also, doing wrong is against doing good. But some thinking thing can do good right away when it is made; like the mind of the one who died for us, or the good spirits. So the bad spirits could also do wrong right away when they were made.
ugf_response: All that is in doing good comes from God; and so a spirit could do good right away when it was made. This same reason does not work for doing wrong; as has been said.

english_query: I should say that nothing could be more loved.
ugf_response: Then once more the idea is said that doing right is loved by the gods?

english_query: Also, a place that has nothing is no good. But after the bad act, the happy garden had no people living in it. So if it was made as a home for people, it seems god made the happy garden for no use.
ugf_response: Even though the happy garden was not no good because no people lived in it after the bad act, it is not like give people never die for no good, even though they would lose it. This show god good to people and what people lost by the bad act. Also some say the old man from a far place and the old man from another far place still live in the happy garden.

english_query: Also, the teacher says that the first man would not have won good by saying no to bad things; but now we do win good when we say no. So our acts are better than those in the first time.
ugf_response: The first man would not have won good by saying no to bad things, if you think he did not have help from the big guy; just like now people without help from the big guy do not win good. But there is a change here: in the first time there was no push inside to do bad, like there is now. So the first man could say no to bad things more easily, even without help from the big guy.

english_query: It looks like what being good really is does not come from having the right way, the right kind, and the right order. Because being good and just being are not the same thing in our talking. But the right way, kind, and order seem to belong to just being, for it is written that you have put all things in right size, count, and how much they pull down. And to these three can be brought back kind, way, and order, as the great old church teacher says: size fixes the way of everything, count gives it its kind, and how much they pull down gives it rest and standing. So what being good really is does not come from having the right way, kind, and order.
ugf_response: These three only go with being, in so far as it is full and done, and by this being full and done is it good.

english_query: Also, something that can be the one who makes itself does not need to be made by another. But a mind being can be the one who makes itself; because it is the one who makes its own thing it does, and does its own thing it does; and it is not made to do its thing it does by another, which seems right for things that are made. So not all things are under the making of the one who made all.
ugf_response: A mind being makes itself with its mind and its want, both of which need to be made and made good by the one who made all mind and want. So above the making where the mind being makes itself as the one who makes its own thing it does, it still needs to be made by the one who made all.

english_query: It looks like there is no order among the parts of the soul. Because in things that are in one group, there is no before and after, but all are at the same time. But the parts of the soul are different from each other. So there is no order among them.
ugf_response: The kinds in a group are like before and after, like numbers, if we look at what they are; even if we say they are at the same time, because they share the name of the big group.

english_query: Also, when the cause is there, the thing caused comes. But what God knows has no start or end. So if what God knows causes made things, it looks like made things have no start or end.
ugf_response: What God knows causes things only as they are in his mind. Now, it was not in the mind of God that things have no start or end; so even though what God knows has no start or end, it does not mean made things have no start or end.

english_query: Also, it seems that some of these days are not needed. Light is like a way a thing is that belongs to the bright things in the sky. But the thing that has this way is made at the same time as the way. So light and the bright things should have been made on the same day.
ugf_response: The way light is in something was made on the first day; and making the bright things on the day after the third does not mean their true stuff was made again, but that they got a new look they did not have before, as said before.

english_query: Also, the deep stuff of the body seems to be part of what makes a person what they are; and if this is gone, it cannot come back, say the men who fix bodies. But it could come back if the food turned into this deep stuff. So the food does not turn into what makes a person what they are.
ugf_response: The deep stuff is said to hold what the power of being human rests on. If this is taken away it cannot be made new; like when a hand or foot is cut off. But the food stuff is that which has not yet become human, but is on its way to do so; like blood. So if this is taken away, the power of being human stays in its start, which is not lost.

english_query: It also looks like the idea that bad should be and the idea that bad should not be are different and can not both be right. But god does not want that bad is not. If god wanted that then because many bad things are there god want would not always be right. So god wants that bad is.
ugf_response: The words that bad is and the words that bad is not are different, but the words that any one wants bad to be and the words that any one wants bad not to be are not different, because each just says a want. So god does not want bad to be, nor does god want bad not to be, but god wants to let bad be, and that is good.

english_query: Also, it seems the soul is not different from a spirit helper except by being with a body. But since the body is not part of what the soul really is, it seems the body does not make up its kind. So the soul and spirit helper are of the same kind.
ugf_response: The body is not part of what the soul really is; but by its way of being the soul can be joined to the body, so that, said right, not the soul alone, but the whole thing, is the kind. And the fact that the soul needs the body for its work shows that the soul has a lower step of thinking power than a spirit helper, who is not joined to a body.

english_query: Also, nothing that has left another is inside it. But the Son came out from the Father from the very start, as the old words say: 'His coming out is from the beginning, from the days of forever.' So the Son is not in the Father.
ugf_response: The way the Son comes from the Father is like a word coming from the heart and staying there. So this coming out in God is only because of how they are seen as different, not because they are not one thing.

english_query: Also, some men who think well said that the best good for a man is in knowing things that stand alone. So if the soul, when it is not with the body, can know these things, its good would be full just by being not with the body; which is not right to say.
ugf_response: The best good for a man is not in knowing any things that stand alone; but in knowing God, who is seen only by help from above. Knowing other things that stand alone, if known in a full way, gives much good--but not the final and best good. But the soul, when not with the body, does not know them in a full way, as was shown before in this talk.

english_query: I will tell you, if you like.
ugf_response: I should very much like.

english_query: Also, the old teacher who studied things says that the start of moving and stopping is in things that do this by what they are, not by chance. But a single being is found in things that do not move, like god and the spirits. So the word for the start of moving should not be in the saying of what a single being is, but the word should be what a thing really is.
ugf_response: The old teacher says the word for the start of moving was first used for the making of living things. Because this making comes from inside, the word grew to mean the inside start of any moving. In this way he says what it is. And since this inside start is either the shape or the stuff, both are called by this word. And as the shape finishes what a thing really is, what a thing really is, shown by the saying, is often called by this word. And here it is used in that way. So another teacher says it is the special mark that gives the shape to each thing, because this mark finishes the saying and comes from the special shape. So in the saying of a single being, which is one thing in a set kind, it is better to use this word than what a thing really is, because the last one comes from being, which is the word used for most things.

english_query: And now, as the old teacher says, read my idea: color is a thing that comes from shape, like what we see, and can be felt.
ugf_response: That, the old teacher, seems to me be a good answer.

english_query: I should say not, old teacher.
ugf_response: But if there is no one who wants to be sad, there is no one, young man, who wants bad things; for what is being sad but the want and having of bad things?

english_query: It looks like the hidden sending of the god part is not just about the gift of making right. For sending a god part means giving that part. So if the god part is sent only because of the gift of making right, then the god part itself is not given, but only its gifts; and this is the wrong idea of those who say the spirit from god is not given, but only its gifts are.
ugf_response: By the gift of making right, the thinking thing is made whole so that it can use not only the made gift, but also be with the god part itself; and so the hidden sending happens because of the gift of making right; and yet the god part itself is given.

english_query: Also, we should only say of god what is backed by the god books, as the old teacher said. But the god books never say that the father, son, and spirit are of one what-they-really-are. So we should not say this.
ugf_response: Even if we do not see these clear words in the god books saying the three are of one what-they-really-are, we do see the same meaning there; like when it says 'I and the father are one,' and 'I am in the father, and the father in me'; and there are many other parts of the book that mean the same thing.

english_query: Why take out some people? Any city good man, taken without a set, if he thinks, will do far more good to him than the people who teach for money?
ugf_response: And did those good men grow on their own; and without being taught by any one, could they still teach others something they never learned?

english_query: It seems that the wish to fight and the wish to want do not listen to right thinking. For these wishes are parts of what we feel with our skin and eyes. But what we feel with our skin and eyes does not listen to right thinking, which is why the great old church teacher says they are shown by the long thing that moves on the ground. So the wish to fight and the wish to want do not listen to right thinking.
ugf_response: The long thing that moves on the ground shows what we feel with our skin and eyes in what is special to them as just feeling things. But the wish to fight and the wish to want name these feelings in how they do things, and right thinking leads them to do things, as we said.

english_query: Of course, if the moving is to be right.
ugf_response: If they only moved in place and were not changed, we should be able to say what is the way things are of the things that are moving and changing?

english_query: Some answer, the old teacher, must be long; but I will try to make them as short as I can, because part of my work is that I can be as short as any one.
ugf_response: That is what we want, the well known teacher of speaking; show the short way now, and the long way some other time.

english_query: And what does our friend the old teacher of the place by the wild dog say-does he say yes to this, or not?
ugf_response: He does not say yes; nor will the man from before, when he sees himself for real. You will agree, I suppose, that good things and bad things are against each other?

english_query: Tell me then, when do you say that they are good and when that they are bad-what way do you set?
ugf_response: I would rather, old teacher, that you should answer as well as ask that question.

english_query: People say that what is true is right to all. Because anyone who says that what is true is not there is saying that what is true is not there; and if what is true is not there, then the words 'what is true is not there' would be true; and if any true thing is there, there must be what is true. But god is what is true itself: 'I am the way, the what is true, and the life.' So the words 'god is there' are right to all.
ugf_response: The thing that what is true is there for all things is right to all, but the thing that a first what is true is there is not right to us.
